pi_items.source: Confirmed via export_result.sh ORK_FILE variable and task.json description.
Confirmed via export_result.sh REPORT_FILE variable and task.json description.
Task description requests a 50mm diameter (0.05m). verifier.py checks that payload tube radius is >= 0.024m (diameter >= 48mm), which acts as a valid tolerance.
Task description requests a 100mm length (0.1m). verifier.py checks that payload tube length is >= 0.095m, acting as a tolerance.
Task description requests a 50g mass. verifier.py checks that the mass is between 48g and 52g.
Confirmed via verifier.py score logic 'passed = score >= 60'.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires modifying a real default OpenRocket model ('A simple model rocket' by Sampo Niskanen) to create a 'hammerhead' payload section. The modified rocket must be saved to /home/ga/Documents/rockets/hammerhead_rocket.ork and a text report written to /home/ga/Documents/exports/hammerhead_report.txt. The required minimum payload tube dimensions (diameter 50mm, length 100mm) and dummy mass (50g) match the prompt instructions, with the verifier using slight tolerances (r >= 24mm, l >= 95mm, mass 48-52g). The verifier assesses restabilization by checking if fin maximum dimensions are >= 45mm and ensuring a flight simulation has run. However, the initial rocket's fin chords (50.8mm) already exceed 45mm, so the aerodynamic check can be passed simply by running the simulation. A score of 60 points is required to pass.
